mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PORT( ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, NATION_CODE, NATION_NAME, IS_DOMESTIC, PROVINCE_CODE, PROVINCE_NAME, CITY_CODE, CITY_NAME, SORT_NUM, ROUTE_CODE, ROUTE_NAME, shorthand_Code, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )VALUES( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDomestic,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{provinceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provinceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_PORT SET PORT_NAME = #{portName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATION_NAME = #{nationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATION_CODE = #{nationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROVINCE_CODE = #{provinceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROVINCE_NAME = #{provinceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CITY_CODE = #{cityCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CITY_NAME = #{cityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROUTE_CODE = #{routeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROUTE_NAME = #{routeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shorthand_Code = #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, NATION_CODE, NATION_NAME, IS_DOMESTIC, PROVINCE_CODE, PROVINCE_NAME, CITY_CODE, CITY_NAME, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, ROUTE_CODE, ROUTE_NAME, SHORTHAND_CODE FROM M_PORT
IS_DOMESTIC = #{isDomestic}
AND (PORT_NAME LIKE #{portName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (SHORTHAND_CODE LIKE #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC

SELECT ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, NATION_CODE, NATION_NAME, IS_DOMESTIC, PROVINCE_CODE, PROVINCE_NAME, CITY_CODE, CITY_NAME, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, ROUTE_CODE, SHORTHAND_CODE, ROUTE_NAME FROM M_PORT WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, NATION_CODE, NATION_NAME, IS_DOMESTIC, PROVINCE_CODE, PROVINCE_NAME, CITY_CODE, CITY_NAME, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, ROUTE_CODE, SHORTHAND_CODE, ROUTE_NAME FROM M_PORT WHERE PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
